+ sudo docker exec vllm-bench vllm bench serve --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8000 --endpoint-type openai-comp --model unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct --dataset-name random --random-input-len 128 --random-output-len 128 --num-prompts 40 --max-concurrency 8 --request-rate inf --save-result --result-dir /tmp --result-filename vllm-c8.json
